subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! Hearken unto the Call from the realm of God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. Verily, He hath made mention of thee with a remembrance wherefrom thou shalt drink [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مهدی اسمع الندآء من شطرالله المهیمن القیوم انه ذکرک بذکر تشرب منه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
